evals.prompt: Besides checking expectations against SKILL.md text, what else does an eval run validate?
evals.expected_output: Runs scripts/skill-bash-smoke.ts on the target skill(s): bash -n parse check on every fenced bash block + CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT fallback/assertion check; smoke findings count as eval failures
expectations: Mentions the bash smoke check / skill-bash-smoke.ts
Mentions bash -n parse validation of fenced bash blocks
Mentions CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT must have :- fallback or :? assertion in the same block
States smoke findings count as eval failures
